2277160.name: Body Count
2277160.description:
Body Count lets you step into the worn shoes of a dedicated cop whose world is shattered by a personal tragedy. As the line between right and wrong blurs, you'll grapple with the moral cost of justice in the face of unspeakable loss. Dive into a gripping experience where personal consequences are no longer calculated and a once venerable cop decends into the path of vengeance.


Body Count is a bullet hell shooter that challenges you to explore the gritty side of morality as you navigate a city teetering on the edge of chaos.
2277160.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
